name: king-core
description: King Core: SDLC completo con 51 skills — genesis, brainstorm, plan, build, review, qa, contract/mutation/property/perf testing, merge, release y pipeline SDD. 10 agentes especializados. Base del ecosistema King Framework. Incluye knowledge de ecosistema y comunidad (trust model, CASTLE Spec v1.0, community templates, certification curriculum, King Hub spec, i18n, platform adapters).
